TypeSignature.Value: .class public auto ansi beforefieldinit SKPathBuilder extends SkiaSharp.SKObject

Docs.summary: Provides a mutable builder for constructing an incrementally.

MemberSignature.Value: public SKPathBuilder ();
.method public hidebysig specialname rtspecialname instance void .ctor() cil managed

Docs.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

MemberSignature.Value: public SKPathBuilder (SkiaSharp.SKPath path);
.method public hidebysig specialname rtspecialname instance void .ctor(class SkiaSharp.SKPath path) cil managed

Docs.param: The path whose contours are copied into the new builder.
Docs.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with the contents of an existing path.

MemberSignature.Value: public void AddArc (SkiaSharp.SKRect oval, float startAngle, float sweepAngle);
.method public hidebysig instance void AddArc(valuetype SkiaSharp.SKRect oval, float32 startAngle, float32 sweepAngle) cil managed

Docs.param: The bounding rectangle of the oval that defines the arc.
The start angle in degrees, measured clockwise from the positive x-axis.
The sweep angle in degrees, measured clockwise from .
Docs.summary: Appends an arc of the specified oval to the path as a new contour.

MemberSignature.Value: public void AddCircle (float x, float y, float radius, SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection dir = SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection.Clockwise);
.method public hidebysig instance void AddCircle(float32 x, float32 y, float32 radius, valuetype SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection dir) cil managed

Docs.param: The x-coordinate of the center of the circle.
The y-coordinate of the center of the circle.
The radius of the circle.
One of the enumeration values that specifies the winding direction of the circle contour.
Docs.summary: Appends a closed circle contour to the path.

MemberSignature.Value: public void AddOval (SkiaSharp.SKRect rect, SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection direction = SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection.Clockwise);
.method public hidebysig instance void AddOval(valuetype SkiaSharp.SKRect rect, valuetype SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection direction) cil managed

Docs.param: The bounding rectangle of the oval.
One of the enumeration values that specifies the winding direction of the oval contour.
Docs.summary: Appends a closed oval contour to the path.

MemberSignature.Value: public void AddPath (SkiaSharp.SKPath other, SkiaSharp.SKPathAddMode mode = SkiaSharp.SKPathAddMode.Append);
.method public hidebysig instance void AddPath(class SkiaSharp.SKPath other, valuetype SkiaSharp.SKPathAddMode mode) cil managed

Docs.param: The path whose contours are appended to the current path.
One of the enumeration values that specifies how the path is appended.
Docs.summary: Appends the contours of another path to the current path.

MemberSignature.Value: public void AddPath (SkiaSharp.SKPath other, in SkiaSharp.SKMatrix matrix, SkiaSharp.SKPathAddMode mode = SkiaSharp.SKPathAddMode.Append);
.method public hidebysig instance void AddPath(class SkiaSharp.SKPath other, [in]valuetype SkiaSharp.SKMatrix& matrix, valuetype SkiaSharp.SKPathAddMode mode) cil managed

Docs.param: The path whose contours are appended to the current path.
The transformation matrix applied to each point in the source path before appending.
One of the enumeration values that specifies how the path is appended.
Docs.summary: Appends the contours of another path, transformed by the specified matrix, to the current path.

MemberSignature.Value: public void AddPath (SkiaSharp.SKPath other, float dx, float dy, SkiaSharp.SKPathAddMode mode = SkiaSharp.SKPathAddMode.Append);
.method public hidebysig instance void AddPath(class SkiaSharp.SKPath other, float32 dx, float32 dy, valuetype SkiaSharp.SKPathAddMode mode) cil managed

Docs.param: The path whose contours are appended to the current path.
The horizontal offset applied to each point in the source path before appending.
The vertical offset applied to each point in the source path before appending.
One of the enumeration values that specifies how the path is appended.
Docs.summary: Appends the contours of another path, translated by the specified offset, to the current path.

MemberSignature.Value: public void AddPoly (SkiaSharp.SKPoint[] points, bool close = true);
.method public hidebysig instance void AddPoly(valuetype SkiaSharp.SKPoint[] points, bool close) cil managed

Docs.param: The array of vertices that form the polygon.
to close the polygon by adding a line back to the first point; otherwise, .
Docs.summary: Appends a polygon contour defined by the specified points to the path.

MemberSignature.Value: public void AddPoly (ReadOnlySpan<SkiaSharp.SKPoint> points, bool close = true);
.method public hidebysig instance void AddPoly(valuetype System.ReadOnlySpan`1<valuetype SkiaSharp.SKPoint> points, bool close) cil managed

Docs.param: The read-only span of vertices that form the polygon.
to close the polygon by adding a line back to the first point; otherwise, .
Docs.summary: Appends a polygon contour defined by the specified points to the path.

MemberSignature.Value: public void AddRect (SkiaSharp.SKRect rect, SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection direction = SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection.Clockwise);
.method public hidebysig instance void AddRect(valuetype SkiaSharp.SKRect rect, valuetype SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection direction) cil managed

Docs.param: The rectangle to add as a closed contour.
One of the enumeration values that specifies the winding direction of the rectangle contour.
Docs.summary: Appends a closed rectangle contour to the path.

MemberSignature.Value: public void AddRect (SkiaSharp.SKRect rect, SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection direction, uint startIndex);
.method public hidebysig instance void AddRect(valuetype SkiaSharp.SKRect rect, valuetype SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection direction, unsigned int32 startIndex) cil managed

Docs.param: The rectangle to add as a closed contour.
One of the enumeration values that specifies the winding direction of the rectangle contour.
The zero-based corner index (0 through 3) at which the contour begins.
Docs.summary: Appends a closed rectangle contour to the path, starting at the specified corner.

MemberSignature.Value: public void AddRoundRect (SkiaSharp.SKRoundRect rect, SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection direction = SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection.Clockwise);
.method public hidebysig instance void AddRoundRect(class SkiaSharp.SKRoundRect rect, valuetype SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection direction) cil managed

Docs.param: The rounded rectangle to add as a closed contour.
One of the enumeration values that specifies the winding direction of the contour.
Docs.summary: Appends a closed rounded-rectangle contour to the path.

MemberSignature.Value: public void AddRoundRect (SkiaSharp.SKRoundRect rect, SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection direction, uint startIndex);
.method public hidebysig instance void AddRoundRect(class SkiaSharp.SKRoundRect rect, valuetype SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection direction, unsigned int32 startIndex) cil managed

Docs.param: The rounded rectangle to add as a closed contour.
One of the enumeration values that specifies the winding direction of the contour.
The zero-based corner index at which the contour begins.
Docs.summary: Appends a closed rounded-rectangle contour to the path, starting at the specified corner.

MemberSignature.Value: public void AddRoundRect (SkiaSharp.SKRect rect, float rx, float ry, SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection dir = SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection.Clockwise);
.method public hidebysig instance void AddRoundRect(valuetype SkiaSharp.SKRect rect, float32 rx, float32 ry, valuetype SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection dir) cil managed

Docs.param: The bounding rectangle of the rounded rectangle.
The x-axis radius of the corner ellipses.
The y-axis radius of the corner ellipses.
One of the enumeration values that specifies the winding direction of the contour.
Docs.summary: Appends a closed rounded-rectangle contour with uniform corner radii to the path.

MemberSignature.Value: public void ArcTo (SkiaSharp.SKPoint point1, SkiaSharp.SKPoint point2, float radius);
.method public hidebysig instance void ArcTo(valuetype SkiaSharp.SKPoint point1, valuetype SkiaSharp.SKPoint point2, float32 radius) cil managed

Docs.param: The first tangent point.
The second tangent point.
The radius of the tangent arc.
Docs.summary: Appends a tangent arc between two lines to the current contour.

MemberSignature.Value: public void ArcTo (SkiaSharp.SKRect oval, float startAngle, float sweepAngle, bool forceMoveTo);
.method public hidebysig instance void ArcTo(valuetype SkiaSharp.SKRect oval, float32 startAngle, float32 sweepAngle, bool forceMoveTo) cil managed

Docs.param: The bounding rectangle of the oval that defines the arc.
The start angle in degrees, measured clockwise from the positive x-axis.
The sweep angle in degrees, measured clockwise from .
to add a move-to before the arc, starting a new contour; to connect the arc to the current point with a line.
Docs.summary: Appends an arc of the specified oval to the current contour.

MemberSignature.Value: public void ArcTo (SkiaSharp.SKPoint r, float xAxisRotate, SkiaSharp.SKPathArcSize largeArc, SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection sweep, SkiaSharp.SKPoint xy);

.method public hidebysig instance void ArcTo(valuetype SkiaSharp.SKPoint r, float32 xAxisRotate, valuetype SkiaSharp.SKPathArcSize largeArc, valuetype SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection sweep, valuetype SkiaSharp.SKPoint xy) cil managed

Docs.param: The radii of the arc ellipse (x-radius and y-radius).
The rotation of the ellipse x-axis relative to the current coordinate system, in degrees.
One of the enumeration values that specifies whether to draw the large or small arc.
One of the enumeration values that specifies the winding direction of the arc.
The end point of the arc.
Docs.summary: Appends an SVG-style elliptical arc to the current contour using the specified radii and end point.

MemberSignature.Value: public void ArcTo (float x1, float y1, float x2, float y2, float radius);
.method public hidebysig instance void ArcTo(float32 x1, float32 y1, float32 x2, float32 y2, float32 radius) cil managed

Docs.param: The x-coordinate of the first tangent point.
The y-coordinate of the first tangent point.
The x-coordinate of the second tangent point.
The y-coordinate of the second tangent point.
The radius of the tangent arc.
Docs.summary: Appends a tangent arc between two lines to the current contour.

MemberSignature.Value: public void ArcTo (float rx, float ry, float xAxisRotate, SkiaSharp.SKPathArcSize largeArc, SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection sweep, float x, float y);

.method public hidebysig instance void ArcTo(float32 rx, float32 ry, float32 xAxisRotate, valuetype SkiaSharp.SKPathArcSize largeArc, valuetype SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection sweep, float32 x, float32 y) cil managed

Docs.param: The x-radius of the arc ellipse.
The y-radius of the arc ellipse.
The rotation of the ellipse x-axis relative to the current coordinate system, in degrees.
One of the enumeration values that specifies whether to draw the large or small arc.
One of the enumeration values that specifies the winding direction of the arc.
The x-coordinate of the end point of the arc.
The y-coordinate of the end point of the arc.
Docs.summary: Appends an SVG-style elliptical arc to the current contour using separate radius and end-point coordinates.

MemberSignature.Value: public void Close ();
.method public hidebysig instance void Close() cil managed

Docs.summary: Closes the current contour by adding a line from the current point back to the starting point of the contour.

MemberSignature.Value: public void ConicTo (SkiaSharp.SKPoint point0, SkiaSharp.SKPoint point1, float w);
.method public hidebysig instance void ConicTo(valuetype SkiaSharp.SKPoint point0, valuetype SkiaSharp.SKPoint point1, float32 w) cil managed

Docs.param: The control point of the conic curve.
The end point of the conic curve.
The weight of the conic, which controls how much the curve is pulled toward the control point.
Docs.summary: Appends a conic (rational quadratic Bezier) curve to the current contour.

MemberSignature.Value: public void ConicTo (float x0, float y0, float x1, float y1, float w);
.method public hidebysig instance void ConicTo(float32 x0, float32 y0, float32 x1, float32 y1, float32 w) cil managed

Docs.param: The x-coordinate of the control point.
The y-coordinate of the control point.
The x-coordinate of the end point.
The y-coordinate of the end point.
The weight of the conic, which controls how much the curve is pulled toward the control point.
Docs.summary: Appends a conic (rational quadratic Bezier) curve to the current contour.

MemberSignature.Value: public void CubicTo (SkiaSharp.SKPoint point0, SkiaSharp.SKPoint point1, SkiaSharp.SKPoint point2);
.method public hidebysig instance void CubicTo(valuetype SkiaSharp.SKPoint point0, valuetype SkiaSharp.SKPoint point1, valuetype SkiaSharp.SKPoint point2) cil managed

Docs.param: The first control point of the cubic Bezier curve.
The second control point of the cubic Bezier curve.
The end point of the cubic Bezier curve.
Docs.summary: Appends a cubic Bezier curve to the current contour.

MemberSignature.Value: public void CubicTo (float x0, float y0, float x1, float y1, float x2, float y2);
.method public hidebysig instance void CubicTo(float32 x0, float32 y0, float32 x1, float32 y1, float32 x2, float32 y2) cil managed

Docs.param: The x-coordinate of the first control point.
The y-coordinate of the first control point.
The x-coordinate of the second control point.
The y-coordinate of the second control point.
The x-coordinate of the end point.
The y-coordinate of the end point.
Docs.summary: Appends a cubic Bezier curve to the current contour.

MemberSignature.Value: public SkiaSharp.SKPath Detach ();
.method public hidebysig instance class SkiaSharp.SKPath Detach() cil managed

Docs.summary: Detaches the accumulated path from the builder, returning it as a new and resetting the builder.
Docs.returns: A new containing the accumulated contours. The builder is reset after this call.

MemberSignature.Value: protected override void Dispose (bool disposing);
.method familyhidebysig virtual instance void Dispose(bool disposing) cil managed

Docs.param: to release both managed and unmanaged resources; to release only unmanaged resources.
Docs.summary: Releases the resources used by the current instance of the class.

MemberSignature.Value: protected override void DisposeNative ();
.method familyhidebysig virtual instance void DisposeNative() cil managed

Docs.summary: Releases the native resources held by the current instance of the class.

MemberSignature.Value: public SkiaSharp.SKPathFillType FillType { get; set; }
.property instance valuetype SkiaSharp.SKPathFillType FillType

Docs.summary: Gets or sets the fill type used to determine the interior of the path.
Docs.value: One of the values that determines how the interior of the path is determined when it self-intersects.

MemberSignature.Value: public void LineTo (SkiaSharp.SKPoint point);
.method public hidebysig instance void LineTo(valuetype SkiaSharp.SKPoint point) cil managed

Docs.param: The point to move to.
Docs.summary: Appends a straight line from the current point to the specified point.

MemberSignature.Value: public void LineTo (float x, float y);
.method public hidebysig instance void LineTo(float32 x, float32 y) cil managed

Docs.param: The x-coordinate of the end point.
The y-coordinate of the end point.
Docs.summary: Appends a straight line from the current point to the specified coordinates.

MemberSignature.Value: public void MoveTo (SkiaSharp.SKPoint point);
.method public hidebysig instance void MoveTo(valuetype SkiaSharp.SKPoint point) cil managed

Docs.param: The end point of the line.
Docs.summary: Begins a new contour at the specified point.

MemberSignature.Value: public void MoveTo (float x, float y);
.method public hidebysig instance void MoveTo(float32 x, float32 y) cil managed

Docs.param: The x-coordinate of the point to move to.
The y-coordinate of the point to move to.
Docs.summary: Begins a new contour at the specified coordinates.

MemberSignature.Value: public void QuadTo (SkiaSharp.SKPoint point0, SkiaSharp.SKPoint point1);
.method public hidebysig instance void QuadTo(valuetype SkiaSharp.SKPoint point0, valuetype SkiaSharp.SKPoint point1) cil managed

Docs.param: The control point of the quadratic Bezier curve.
The end point of the quadratic Bezier curve.
Docs.summary: Appends a quadratic Bezier curve to the current contour.

MemberSignature.Value: public void QuadTo (float x0, float y0, float x1, float y1);
.method public hidebysig instance void QuadTo(float32 x0, float32 y0, float32 x1, float32 y1) cil managed

Docs.param: The x-coordinate of the control point.
The y-coordinate of the control point.
The x-coordinate of the end point.
The y-coordinate of the end point.
Docs.summary: Appends a quadratic Bezier curve to the current contour.

MemberSignature.Value: public void RArcTo (SkiaSharp.SKPoint r, float xAxisRotate, SkiaSharp.SKPathArcSize largeArc, SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection sweep, SkiaSharp.SKPoint xy);

.method public hidebysig instance void RArcTo(valuetype SkiaSharp.SKPoint r, float32 xAxisRotate, valuetype SkiaSharp.SKPathArcSize largeArc, valuetype SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection sweep, valuetype SkiaSharp.SKPoint xy) cil managed

Docs.param: The radii of the arc ellipse (x-radius and y-radius), specified relative to the current point.
The rotation of the ellipse x-axis relative to the current coordinate system, in degrees.
One of the enumeration values that specifies whether to draw the large or small arc.
One of the enumeration values that specifies the winding direction of the arc.
The end point of the arc, specified relative to the current point.
Docs.summary: Appends a relative SVG-style elliptical arc to the current contour.

MemberSignature.Value: public void RArcTo (float rx, float ry, float xAxisRotate, SkiaSharp.SKPathArcSize largeArc, SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection sweep, float x, float y);

.method public hidebysig instance void RArcTo(float32 rx, float32 ry, float32 xAxisRotate, valuetype SkiaSharp.SKPathArcSize largeArc, valuetype SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection sweep, float32 x, float32 y) cil managed

Docs.param: The x-radius of the arc ellipse.
The y-radius of the arc ellipse.
The rotation of the ellipse x-axis relative to the current coordinate system, in degrees.
One of the enumeration values that specifies whether to draw the large or small arc.
One of the enumeration values that specifies the winding direction of the arc.
The x-offset of the end point relative to the current point.
The y-offset of the end point relative to the current point.
Docs.summary: Appends a relative SVG-style elliptical arc to the current contour.

MemberSignature.Value: public void RConicTo (SkiaSharp.SKPoint point0, SkiaSharp.SKPoint point1, float w);
.method public hidebysig instance void RConicTo(valuetype SkiaSharp.SKPoint point0, valuetype SkiaSharp.SKPoint point1, float32 w) cil managed

Docs.param: The control point of the conic curve, relative to the current point.
The end point of the conic curve, relative to the current point.
The weight of the conic.
Docs.summary: Appends a relative conic (rational quadratic Bezier) curve to the current contour.

MemberSignature.Value: public void RConicTo (float dx0, float dy0, float dx1, float dy1, float w);

Docs.param: The x-offset of the control point relative to the current point.
The y-offset of the control point relative to the current point.
The x-offset of the end point relative to the current point.
The y-offset of the end point relative to the current point.
The weight of the conic.
Docs.summary: Appends a relative conic (rational quadratic Bezier) curve to the current contour.

MemberSignature.Value: public void RCubicTo (SkiaSharp.SKPoint point0, SkiaSharp.SKPoint point1, SkiaSharp.SKPoint point2);

Docs.param: The first control point, relative to the current point.
The second control point, relative to the current point.
The end point, relative to the current point.
Docs.summary: Appends a relative cubic Bezier curve to the current contour.

MemberSignature.Value: public void RCubicTo (float dx0, float dy0, float dx1, float dy1, float dx2, float dy2);
.method public hidebysig instance void RCubicTo(float32 dx0, float32 dy0, float32 dx1, float32 dy1, float32 dx2, float32 dy2) cil managed

Docs.param: The x-offset of the first control point relative to the current point.
The y-offset of the first control point relative to the current point.
The x-offset of the second control point relative to the current point.
The y-offset of the second control point relative to the current point.
The x-offset of the end point relative to the current point.
The y-offset of the end point relative to the current point.
Docs.summary: Appends a relative cubic Bezier curve to the current contour.

MemberSignature.Value: public void Reset ();
.method public hidebysig instance void Reset() cil managed

Docs.summary: Resets the builder, removing all contours and restoring the default fill type.

MemberSignature.Value: public void ReverseAddPath (SkiaSharp.SKPath other);
.method public hidebysig instance void ReverseAddPath(class SkiaSharp.SKPath other) cil managed

Docs.param: The path whose contours are appended in reverse order.
Docs.summary: Appends the contours of another path to the current path in reverse order.

MemberSignature.Value: public void RLineTo (SkiaSharp.SKPoint point);
.method public hidebysig instance void RLineTo(valuetype SkiaSharp.SKPoint point) cil managed

Docs.param: The end point, specified relative to the current point.
Docs.summary: Appends a straight line from the current point to a point at the specified relative offset.

MemberSignature.Value: public void RLineTo (float dx, float dy);
.method public hidebysig instance void RLineTo(float32 dx, float32 dy) cil managed

Docs.param: The x-offset of the end point relative to the current point.
The y-offset of the end point relative to the current point.
Docs.summary: Appends a straight line from the current point to a point at the specified relative offset.

MemberSignature.Value: public void RMoveTo (SkiaSharp.SKPoint point);
.method public hidebysig instance void RMoveTo(valuetype SkiaSharp.SKPoint point) cil managed

Docs.param: The offset from the current point at which the new contour begins.
Docs.summary: Begins a new contour at a point offset from the current point.

MemberSignature.Value: public void RMoveTo (float dx, float dy);
.method public hidebysig instance void RMoveTo(float32 dx, float32 dy) cil managed

Docs.param: The x-offset from the current point.
The y-offset from the current point.
Docs.summary: Begins a new contour at a point offset from the current point.

The end point, relative to the current point.

MemberSignature.Value: public void RQuadTo (float dx0, float dy0, float dx1, float dy1);
.method public hidebysig instance void RQuadTo(float32 dx0, float32 dy0, float32 dx1, float32 dy1) cil managed

Docs.param: The x-offset of the control point relative to the current point.
The y-offset of the control point relative to the current point.
The x-offset of the end point relative to the current point.
The y-offset of the end point relative to the current point.
Docs.summary: Appends a relative quadratic Bezier curve to the current contour.

MemberSignature.Value: public SkiaSharp.SKPath Snapshot ();
.method public hidebysig instance class SkiaSharp.SKPath Snapshot() cil managed

Docs.summary: Returns a copy of the current path without resetting the builder.
Docs.returns: A new containing a copy of the current contours. The builder retains its state and can continue to be used.
